title: OpenAI GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro now available as Databricks-hosted models
body:
Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports OpenAI [GPT-5.5](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-5-5) and [GPT-5.5 Pro](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-5-5-pro) as Databricks-hosted models. You can access these models using [Foundation Model APIs pay-per-token](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis#token-foundation-apis).

Customers are responsible for ensuring their compliance with [applicable terms](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/acceptable-use-models).
